direct_answer: Earlier is better, especially for seasonal porch installs, weekends, hotel surprises, and dates tied to birthdays or milestone events. Porch & Party can still review shorter-notice requests, but availability is never guaranteed until confirmed.
best_for: This page is for buyers who are trying to decide whether they are planning early, already late, or still have enough time to get a styled setup done well.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
